subject: Automating client onboarding at Lewis CPA
body:
Hi Marye,

I came across Lewis CPA LLC and was impressed by the breadth of services you offer, from small business accounting to QuickBooks setup to industry-specific work for healthcare and law firms.

With that many service lines, client onboarding probably involves a lot of manual steps: collecting documents, sending engagement letters, setting up access. We help accounting firms automate that entire workflow so new clients get a seamless experience and your team saves hours per client.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Wide service range from bookkeeping to tax to advisory
Serves healthcare, law firms, real estate, music industries
